title: 🚨 OTF GRANT APPLICATION — FILL THIS OUT
details: Remi from OTF (Open Technology Fund) replied to our outreach. Said they can NOT accept through helpdesk but gave us the REAL application link. We need to fill out the actual OTF application.
action: Find Remi's email in Gmail for the actual application URL. Fill out the OTF application together with Claude.
context: OTF funds open source internet freedom tools. Perfect fit for SolarPunk. This is a real lead — they responded and pointed us to the real door.
